title: Workshop: Style a Heat-Relief Service Menu
summary: Workshop: Style a Heat-Relief Service Menu retrieves prior skills in an original hydration station services embedded in the community survey scenario and requires implementation, behavior, failure-state, and transfer evidence.
objectives: Apply css rules syntax, css application methods, css type class id selectors, css cascade origins layers, css inheritance initial, css box model, css display flow in unfamiliar constraints.
Produce or audit a real hydration station services embedded in the community survey artifact without happy-path-only reasoning.
Preserve earlier requirements while testing keyboard, narrow-width, invalid, and assistive-semantic states.
